急(hr).title: Former L3Harris Trenchant boss jailed for selling hacking tools to Russian broker
急(hr).summary: Peter Williams, the former head of U.S. hacking tools maker L3Harris Trenchant, was sentenced to seven years in prison for stealing and selling his former company’s hacking and surveillance tools to a Russian firm.

急(hr).title: Google’s new 1.9GW clean energy deal includes massive 100-hour battery
急(hr).summary: Form Energy's iron-air batteries will store wind and solar power to keep the data center running 24/7.

急(hr).title: CarGurus data breach affects 12.5 million accounts
急(hr).summary: Automotive marketplace CarGurus was the target of a data breach in which the names, email addresses, phone numbers, and physical addresses of millions of customers were stolen.

急(hr).title: Anthropic won’t budge as Pentagon escalates AI dispute
急(hr).summary: The Pentagon has given Anthropic until Friday to loosen AI guardrails or face potential penalties, escalating a high-stakes dispute that raises questions about government leverage, vendor dependence, and investor confidence in defense tech.

急(hr).title: DJI sues the FCC for “carelessly” restricting its drones
急(hr).summary: DJI lawsuit says company has been "severely harmed by the FCC’s ruling."

急(hr).title: Discord delays global rollout of age verification after backlash
急(hr).summary: The company added that 90% of users won’t need to verify their age and will be able to keep using Discord as usual.

急(hr).title: Instagram head pressed on lengthy delay to launch teen safety features, like a nudity filter, court filing reveals
急(hr).summary: An email chain with Instagram head Adam Mosseri indicated the company was aware of teen safety issues in DMs in 2018, but didn't launch its unwanted nudity filter until 2024.

急(hr).title: UK fines Reddit for not checking user ages aggressively enough
急(hr).summary: UK agency alleges "Reddit failed to apply any robust age assurance mechanism."

急(hr).title: More startups are hitting $10M ARR in 3 months than ever before
急(hr).summary: AI has brought the startup world the rise of startups that instantly hit multimillion ARR. Stripe revealed some data that shows how common this has become.

急(hr).title: Instagram’s TV app is launching on Google TV devices
急(hr).summary: By bringing Reels to TVs, Instagram looking to better compete with YouTube, which largely dominates the TV space.

急(hr).title: The Guardian view on Donald Trump’s tariffs: a nostalgia that misreads a changed world | Editorial
急(hr).summary: The US president fights 1970s battles in a financialised age. America faces not a payments crisis but a slow erosion of industrial and technological powerWhen the US supreme court voted 6-3 last Friday to strike down Donald Trump’s tariffs, he was incandescent. Two judges he had elevated – Neil Gors...

急(hr).title: Young bearing the brunt of UK tax and wage changes, says BoE economist
急(hr).summary: Huw Pill warns combined effect of national insurance and minimum wage rises have ‘acute’ effect on youth employment The negative effect of a combined increase in employers’ taxes and minimum wages has been “particularly acute” for young people, the Bank of England’s chief economist has warned.Huw Pi...

急(hr).title: Treasury sanctions Russian zero-day broker accused of buying exploits stolen from US defense contractor
急(hr).summary: The U.S. Treasury announced it was imposing sanctions against a Russian broker of zero-day exploits, its founder and two affiliates, citing a threat to U.S. national security. Another affiliated zero-day broker in the United Arab Emirates was also sanctioned.

急(hr).title: Google adds a way to create automated workflows to Opal
急(hr).summary: The company said that a new agent being introduced in Opal will allow users to create mini-apps that can let them plan and execute tasks using text prompts.

急(hr).title: Spotify and Liquid Death release a limited-edition speaker shaped like … an urn?
急(hr).summary: Spotify and Liquid Death launched what might be the wildest product of the year: a speaker shaped like a urn.

急(hr).title: In a replay of 2019, Apple says a single desktop Mac will be manufactured in the US
急(hr).summary: Apple is still working to get favorable tariff treatment from the Trump administration.

急(hr).title: Twitch is overhauling its suspensions policy
急(hr).summary: The company is implementing two suspension types: streaming suspensions and chatting suspensions.

急(hr).title: OpenAI COO says ‘we have not yet really seen AI penetrate enterprise business processes’
急(hr).summary: There is a lot of talk around AI agents taking over business processes and claiming that "SaaS is dead." While these predictions have moved SaaS stocks at times, they haven't really come true.

急(hr).title: Stripe’s valuation soars 74% to $159 billion
急(hr).summary: Stripe has conducted another tender offer, where employees sell shares. Investors include Thrive Capital, Coatue, a16z, and Stripe itself.

急(hr).title: Inside the quixotic team trying to build an entire world in a 20-year-old game
急(hr).summary: Stories and lesson learned from an impossibly large community modding project.

急(hr).title: YouTube beefs up its $7.99/month Lite subscription with offline downloads and background play
急(hr).summary: Now the only reason to get the full Premium subscription is ad-free music and music videos.

急(hr).title: Music generator ProducerAI joins Google Labs
急(hr).summary: Wyclef Jean used Google's AI music tools on his new song "Back in Abu Dhabi."
